deal.target_legal_counsel: Cooley LLP; Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz

events.bid_type_inference_note: Informal per §G1: filing calls it a "non-binding proposal" (explicit informal trigger). Bid is pre-NDA per §C4 (Sanofi signs NDA later by 7/5), and pre-NDA concrete price indications are informal by construction.
events.additional_note: Letter dated April 13, 2016; per §B5 incoming-receipt anchoring, row dates to receipt date April 15, 2016.
events.source_quote: On April 15, 2016, Dr. David Hung, President and CEO of Medivation, received a letter dated April 13, 2016 from the Chief Executive Officer of Sanofi, setting forth a non-binding proposal to acquire Medivation for $52.50 per share.

flags.reason: Sanofi communicated $52.50/share non-binding proposal on 4/15/2016 (letter dated 4/13, receipt 4/15 per §B5); Sanofi later signs NDA by 7/5/2016 per subsequent press release, satisfying §P-D6 existence.

events.additional_note: Public announcement of Sanofi's unsolicited proposal.
events.source_quote: Sanofi’s proposal was publicly announced on April 28, 2016 and unanimously rejected by Medivation’s Board of Directors on April 29, 2016.

events.additional_note: Pfizer expressed exploratory interest; no price or concrete sale proposal (§D1 Bidder Interest).
events.source_quote: On May 2, 2016, Mr. Giordano and Dr. Hung spoke by phone. During this conversation, and in light of the public announcement on April 28 of Sanofi’s proposal, Mr. Giordano expressed Pfizer’s interest in a possible transaction when, and if, Medivation decided to pursue such a transaction.

events.bid_date_rough: first narration: 2016-05-11 Centerview contacts Medivation advisors for Pfizer
events.additional_note: Financial advisor to Pfizer; retention date not narrated, anchored to earliest action per §J1.
events.source_quote: On May 11, 2016, representatives of Centerview Partners LLC (“Centerview”), a financial advisor to Pfizer, contacted representatives of J.P. Morgan Securities LLC (“J.P. Morgan”) and Evercore Group L.L.C. (“Evercore”), financial advisors to Medivation, regarding Pfizer’s potential strategic interest in Medivation.

flags.reason: filing does not narrate retention date; inferred from first mention (§J1)

events.source_quote: On June 29, 2016, Pfizer executed a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Medivation, and Medivation invited Pfizer to participate in a potential sale process.

events.bid_date_rough: inferred from press release: 2016-07-05 Medivation announcement of NDAs with several parties including Sanofi
events.additional_note: Filing does not state Sanofi's NDA signing date; anchored to 7/5 press release date per §B3 context inference.
events.source_quote: On July 5, 2016, Medivation issued a press release announcing that it had entered into confidentiality agreements with several parties, including Sanofi, and that Sanofi had agreed to withdraw its consent solicitation.

flags.reason: filing does not narrate Sanofi's NDA execution date; anchored to 7/5 press release announcement

events.bid_date_rough: first narration: 2016-07-07 Guggenheim acts for Pfizer in DD discussions with Medivation advisors
events.additional_note: Financial advisor to Pfizer; retention date not narrated, anchored to earliest action per §J1 (first day of July 7-11 range).
events.source_quote: On July 7 through July 11, 2016, representatives of Pfizer, Guggenheim Securities, LLC (“Guggenheim”), a financial advisor to Pfizer, and Centerview had discussions by telephone with representatives of Evercore and J.P. Morgan regarding the due diligence process.

flags.reason: filing does not narrate retention date; inferred from first mention (§J1)

events.additional_note: Medivation's advisors invited Pfizer (and potentially others) to submit a written non-binding preliminary proposal on 8/8/2016; §K2 implicit informal round announcement.
events.source_quote: On July 19, 2016, representatives of J.P. Morgan and Evercore sent a letter to representatives of Pfizer requesting that Pfizer submit a written, non-binding preliminary proposal for an acquisition of Medivation on August 8, 2016. The letter stated that, should Medivation decide to continue exploring potential interest in a transaction, a limited number of qualified parties may be invited to enter into further discussions and be provided additional due diligence materials.

flags.reason: no explicit 'informal round' phrase; inferred per §K2 from process-letter language requesting non-binding preliminary proposal on 8/8/2016

events.bid_type_inference_note: Informal per §G1: filing explicitly calls it a "non-binding preliminary proposal" (explicit informal trigger). Submitted in response to 7/19 non-binding round invitation; pre-merger-agreement; contingent on DD completion.
events.process_conditions_note: Subject to satisfactory completion of due diligence. Not subject to any financing condition.
events.source_quote: On August 8, 2016, Pfizer submitted a non-binding preliminary proposal to Medivation (the “August 8 Proposal”), subject to, among other conditions, satisfactory completion of Pfizer’s due diligence, to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $65.00 per Share. The August 8 Proposal stated that it was not subject to any financing condition and that Pfizer expected to be able to complete due diligence and sign a definitive transaction agreement in approximately one week.

events.additional_note: Informal-round submission deadline per §K2 (paired with 7/19 Final Round Inf Ann).
events.source_quote: On August 8, 2016, Pfizer submitted a non-binding preliminary proposal to Medivation (the “August 8 Proposal”), subject to, among other conditions, satisfactory completion of Pfizer’s due diligence, to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $65.00 per Share.

flags.reason: no explicit 'informal round' phrase; deadline inferred from 7/19 process letter and 8/8 non-binding proposal submission

events.additional_note: Medivation's advisors requested Pfizer deliver markup 8/18 and definitive proposal 8/19; §K2 final-round announcement (invitation date).
events.source_quote: On August 14, 2016, representatives of J.P. Morgan and Evercore sent a letter to Pfizer, requesting that Pfizer provide to Medivation a mark-up of the Merger Agreement on August 18, 2016 and a definitive proposal to acquire Medivation on August 19, 2016.

flags.reason: no explicit 'final round' phrase; inferred per §K2 from definitive-proposal request + merger-agreement markup context

events.additional_note: Medivation's advisors verbally requested Pfizer submit 'best and final' proposal by 8/20 — extension of the 8/19 final-round deadline.
events.source_quote: In addition, on August 19, 2016, Mr. Giordano spoke with representatives of J.P. Morgan and Evercore, who informed Mr. Giordano that Pfizer should submit its “best and final” offer on Saturday, August 20, 2016.

flags.reason: no explicit 'extension' phrase; inferred per §K2 from post-8/19-bid verbal 'best and final' request

events.bid_type_inference_note: Formal per §G1: submitted in direct response to 8/14 process letter requesting a definitive proposal with merger-agreement markup delivered 8/18; final-round process-position per §K2.
events.source_quote: On August 19, 2016, Pfizer submitted a revised written proposal to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $77.00 per Share.

events.additional_note: Final-round submission deadline per §K2 (paired with 8/14 Final Round Ann).
events.source_quote: On August 19, 2016, Pfizer submitted a revised written proposal to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $77.00 per Share.

flags.reason: no explicit 'final round' phrase; deadline inferred from 8/14 process letter and 8/19 definitive proposal submission

events.bid_type_inference_note: Formal per §G1: explicit "best and final" trigger phrase. Submitted in response to written request by Medivation's financial advisors; post-merger-agreement-negotiation context.
events.source_quote: Following a written request by J.P. Morgan and Evercore to provide Pfizer’s “best and final” proposal by the afternoon of August 20, 2016, Pfizer communicated a “best and final” proposal to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $81.50 per Share on August 20, 2016.

events.additional_note: Extension-round submission deadline per §K2 (paired with 8/19 Final Round Ext Ann).
events.source_quote: Following a written request by J.P. Morgan and Evercore to provide Pfizer’s “best and final” proposal by the afternoon of August 20, 2016, Pfizer communicated a “best and final” proposal to acquire Medivation for cash consideration of $81.50 per Share on August 20, 2016.

flags.reason: no explicit 'extension' phrase; deadline inferred from 8/20 'best and final' submission following 8/19 verbal request

events.additional_note: Merger Agreement executed 8/20 afternoon; public announcement via joint press release 8/22 (folded into source_quote per non-negotiable rule).
source_quote: Following Pfizer’s “best and final” proposal, the Medivation Board of Directors approved the transaction with Pfizer. Pfizer, Purchaser and Medivation each executed the Merger Agreement on the afternoon of Saturday, August 20, 2016.
On Monday, August 22, 2016, Pfizer and Medivation issued a joint press release announcing the proposed transaction.
